title: 2026 Thailand Lantern Festival: Where to Watch
desc: Compare the three main Yi Peng sky-lantern venues on Nov 24-25, 2026 in Chiang Mai.

items.label: CAD Heritage (Premium)
items.desc: Paid, large-scale, simultaneous release. Buffet + bus included. Highly organized. International / Brazilian crowd. From $150 USD.

items.label: Doi Saket (Mid-tier)
items.desc: Paid, medium scale, simultaneous release. Buffet + bus included. Organized. Asian / Western crowd. From $115 USD.

items.label: In-Town Public (Free)
items.desc: Free admission, small scale, non-simultaneous release. Street food only, no bus. Locals & backpackers. DIY lanterns from $30 / ~100 THB each.
